blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 5,044 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
